race.comment: WATT ON EARTH (2) opened this prep with a win two runs ago. Not disgraced last time out when in the firing line on the bend before winding up in second over 1600m at Ararat, beaten a neck. Has his share of talent. Hard to beat in this suitable race. PENDANTE (8) has recorded three minor placings from three starts this preparation, the latest when third as a well-fancied conveyance over 1612m at Kilmore. Suited in this and she has solid claims. PARIS AFFAIR (1) is a former Queenslander who lost all form last prep but ran up to a nice jumpout first up in the race WATT ON EARTH also came through. Has some ground to make up on that galloper here, but will have come on fitness-wise. KADDARI (6) took 25 starts to break the maiden, but did so in style and might go on with it here.
